current_judgment: Multi-model POV survey complete (2026-03-21): 5 models tested against 4 POV validation scenes using the final 6-dimension prompt (pov_fidelity dedicated dimension). Results: qwen2.5:14b 2/4 (passes 07 and 08), qwen3:14b 2/4 (passes 08 only among violations — worse on 07 than baseline), cogito:14b 2/4 (passes 04 at 0.35 — strongest result for first-person intrusion — and 08), gemma3:12b 2/4 (passes 04 at 0.50 exactly and 08), phi4-reasoning 0/4 (timed out at 480s, not viable for WORKHORSE_LOCAL). No tested model passes all 4 thresholds. Confirmed capability ceiling: (1) scene-04 type violations (explicit first-person block in close-third) detectable by cogito:14b and gemma3:12b but not qwen models; (2) scene-06 type violations (reader address) not detected by any tested model — consistently misread as narrator voice; (3) scene-07 type violations (single-sentence omniscient aside) inconsistently handled — qwen2.5 passes but other models do not, suggesting model-specific behavior not generalizable detection. pov_fidelity is the correct schema dimension and cleanly separates perspective contract from tonal register concerns. pov_fidelity scores from all tested WORKHORSE_LOCAL models are advisory only and not gate-eligible. Gate-eligible POV enforcement requires FRONTIER_CLOUD evaluation or a dedicated analyze.pov.scene.v1 contract.
next_required_decision: Multi-model survey is complete and has confirmed the WORKHORSE_LOCAL ceiling. Decision: run the full 5-scene baseline set (scenes 01–05) with qwen2.5:14b against the final 6-dimension prompt to confirm no regressions on non-POV dimensions (clarity, flow, voice_consistency, sentence_variety, pacing). If baseline set passes schema_reliability 1.00 and non-POV dimensions are stable, promote to candidate_baseline with pov_fidelity limitation documented in provenance_notes. pov_fidelity scores are advisory only and must not be used as gate signals until a FRONTIER_CLOUD model evaluation (e.g., Claude Sonnet) or a dedicated analyze.pov.scene.v1 contract is completed.
provenance_notes: Metrics derived from operator judgment across 5 eval scenes (run-2026-03-21-001 through run-2026-03-21-005). schema_reliability: 5/5 runs returned valid schema envelope. false_positive_rate: 0 clearly incorrect findings identified across all 5 runs. surface_detection_rate: 4/4 targeted style issues detected (scene-04 counted as detected despite dimension miscategorization). All metrics are operator-judged from a small 5-scene set. Not benchmark-derived. Not gate-eligible. pov_fidelity limitation: multi-model survey (qwen2.5:14b, qwen3:14b, cogito:14b, gemma3:12b, phi4-reasoning) confirms no WORKHORSE_LOCAL model passes all 4 POV validation thresholds. Best result is 2/4. pov_fidelity is in the schema as the correct semantic design but scores must not be used as gate signals for POV enforcement. See evals/style-analysis-calibration-2026-03-21.md §Multi-model POV validation survey for full results. metric_profile is set to detection_reasoning as the closest available value; style analysis identifies issues and reasons about them but is not a binary detection task.
